metadata.description: SOC Overview Workbook — Alert volume, top sources, MTTD/MTTR, open incidents by severity
metadata.nistControls: AU-6 (audit review and analysis), SI-4 (information system monitoring)
metadata.author: JSA AppSec
metadata.WHY: SOC analysts need a single pane of glass. This workbook answers: Are we getting alerts? From what? How fast are we finding and fixing them?

content.json:
# SOC Overview — Security Operations Dashboard

Key metrics: Alert volume, top sources, open incidents, MTTD/MTTR. Refresh: last 24 hours.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize AlertCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Alert Volume Over Time

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by AlertName
| top 10 by Count desc
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 Alert Sources

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status != 'Closed'
| summarize Count = count() by Severity
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Open Incidents by Severity

content.query:
// MTTD: Mean Time to Detect — time from first alert to incident creation
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status == 'Closed'
| extend
    MTTD_Hours = datetime_diff('hour', CreatedTime, FirstActivityTime),
    MTTR_Hours = datetime_diff('hour', ClosedTime, CreatedTime)
| summarize
    Avg_MTTD_Hours = avg(MTTD_Hours),
    Avg_MTTR_Hours = avg(MTTR_Hours),
    Incidents_Closed = count()
| project
    ['Avg MTTD (hours)'] = round(Avg_MTTD_Hours, 1),
    ['Avg MTTR (hours)'] = round(Avg_MTTR_Hours, 1),
    ['Incidents Closed'] = Incidents_Closed
content.title: MTTD / MTTR Metrics

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status != 'Closed'
| where Severity in ('High', 'Critical')
| project TimeGenerated, Title, Severity, Status, Owner=tostring(Owner.assignedTo)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.title: Open High/Critical Incidents
